hooks.name: stride-after-tool
hooks.description: Executes .stride.md hooks after Stride API calls (before_doing, before_review, after_review)

hooks.name: stride-before-tool
hooks.description: Executes .stride.md after_doing hook before task completion (blocks on failure)

hooks.name: stride-skill-gate
hooks.description: Blocks direct activation of Stride sub-skills unless dispatched from inside stride-workflow
